# Fixture 04 — NEEDS resource + OPENS file dependencies
# Plan §2.1, §5.2 (NEEDS_RESOURCE + WAITS_FOR_FILE edges).

SCHEDULE WORKSTATION_A#MASTER#FEED_PROCESSOR
  ON RUNCYCLE EVERY_WEEKDAY VALIDFROM 01/01/2025
  AT 0600
:
  WAIT_FOR_FEED
    SCRIPTNAME "/apps/feeds/await.sh"
    STREAMLOGON tws_user
    OPENS "/data/feeds/sales_YYYYMMDD.csv"
    RECOVERY STOP

  PROCESS_FEED
    SCRIPTNAME "/apps/feeds/process.sh"
    STREAMLOGON tws_user
    FOLLOWS WAIT_FOR_FEED
    NEEDS 1 FEED_PROCESSOR_SLOT
    RECOVERY RERUN

  ARCHIVE_FEED
    SCRIPTNAME "/apps/feeds/archive.sh"
    STREAMLOGON tws_user
    FOLLOWS PROCESS_FEED
    NEEDS 2 NETWORK_BANDWIDTH
    RECOVERY CONTINUE
END
